intro: All wood types — White Oak, Oak, Hickory, and Seasoned Hardwoods — are the same price. Price varies by quantity. Delivery and stacking included.

tiers.name: Bundle
tiers.description: A small bundle — great for a single evening by the fire or trying us out for the first time.

tiers.name: Face Cord
tiers.description: One row of wood stacked 4 ft high × 8 ft long. Ideal for occasional use through the season.

tiers.name: Half Cord
tiers.description: Two rows stacked 4 ft high × 8 ft long. The right amount for a typical residential season.

tiers.name: Full Cord
tiers.description: The standard firewood measurement — 4 ft × 4 ft × 8 ft. Best value for heavy home use.

tiers.name: 2 Cords
tiers.description: Two full cords for those who burn wood as a primary heat source or have a large property.

tiers.name: Commercial / Bulk
tiers.description: Custom quantities for restaurants, pizza ovens, BBQ kitchens, hotels, and resorts. Kiln-dried available.
